extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: Mire Sirens is a community-maintained continuation of the Fen Light addon family. This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news: v1.0.1 - Fixed empty TV lists (Trending, Trending Recent, Popular, Popular Today) caused by missing external_ids in TMDB responses. Fixed Trakt Calendar error when Trakt is not connected or returns no data; it now shows a clear message instead.

addon.name: FENtastical Helper
addon.provider-name: isleysharleen (fork of script.fentastic.helper by Tikipeter, Ivar Brandt)

extension.description: FENtastical Helper for the FENtastical Skin.
FENtastical Helper for the FENtastical Skin.
FENtastical Helper for the FENtastical Skin.

extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
extension.description: FENtastical is a fork of FENtastic by Ivar Brandt, which itself is a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use only with FEN.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastical is a fork of FENtastic by Ivar Brandt, which itself is a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use only with FEN.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastical is a fork of FENtastic by Ivar Brandt, which itself is a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use only with FEN.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.
Repository hosting the Mire Sirens video add-on (a community-maintained continuation of the Fen Light addon family) along with the FENtastical skin and its companion helper script.
